info.name: SPC Online Academy API
info.description: Complete API collection for SPC Online Academy - a medical education platform. Base URL: http://spc.localhost/api/v1

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints: register, login, logout, user info, token refresh, and password reset.

request.description: Register a new student or instructor account. Returns user data and authentication token.
Login as a student. Supports login by email or phone number. The test script auto-captures the token.
Login as an instructor (Dr. Ahmed Hassan). The test script auto-captures the token.
Logout the currently authenticated user and revoke the current access token.
Get the currently authenticated user's profile data including instructor profile if applicable.
Refresh the authentication token. Revokes the current token and issues a new one.
Send a password reset link to the user's email address.
Reset user password using a token received via email. Revokes all existing tokens.
Subscribe to notifications for new courses in a category. Requires authentication.
Unsubscribe from category notifications. Requires authentication.

item.name: Public
item.description: Public endpoints accessible without authentication: courses, categories, instructors, subscription plans, and contact.

query.description: Filter by level: beginner, intermediate, advanced
Sort order: newest, popular, highest_rated, price_low, price_high

request.description: List all published courses with filtering, searching, and sorting. Supports pagination.
Get up to 8 featured published courses, ordered by newest first.
Get detailed information about a specific course by slug, including modules, lessons, instructor, reviews, and enrollment count.
Get all categories with their course counts, ordered by sort_order.
Get a specific instructor's public profile by user ID, including their published courses with ratings and enrollment counts.
Get all active subscription plans, ordered by duration in months.
Submit a contact message. Fields: name (required), email (required), subject (optional), message (required).
Returns all public site settings including general info, appearance, social media, SEO, and maintenance status.
Get bundle details with included courses by slug. Returns bundle info, pricing, and all courses in the bundle.
Returns cached platform statistics: active students, total courses, total instructors, average rating.
Returns top approved reviews (rating >= 4) with user name, avatar, title and course title.
Returns category details with courses count, total students, featured videos count, and courses list.
Returns paginated free video lessons within a category with search and sorting.
Returns legal page content for Terms of Service.
Returns legal page content for Privacy Policy.
Returns FAQ page content with questions grouped by category.
Returns About page content (title, description, mission, vision, values).

item.name: Student
item.description: Student-specific endpoints requiring authentication with a student role.

request.description: Get student dashboard data: enrolled courses count, active subscriptions, completed courses, certificates earned, and continue learning list.

query.description: Filter by status: all, in-progress, completed

request.description: List all enrolled courses for the authenticated student with filtering by status and search by title. Supports pagination.
Get the course player data for a specific enrolled course. Returns course info, enrollment progress, modules with lessons, and lesson completion status.
Mark a lesson as completed. Recalculates enrollment progress and triggers certificate generation when all lessons and quizzes are done.
Get detailed progress for a specific enrolled course, including total lessons, completed count, and per-lesson completion data.
List all certificates earned by the authenticated student, ordered by issue date descending.
Get certificate download data including certificate number, student name, course title, instructor name, and PDF download URL.
List all subscriptions for the authenticated student with plan details, ordered by creation date descending.
Create a new subscription for the authenticated student. Requires an active subscription plan ID.
Update subscription settings (auto_renew toggle) for a specific subscription.
Cancel a specific subscription. Sets status to cancelled and disables auto-renew.
List all orders for the authenticated student with items and course details. Supports pagination.
Get detailed information about a specific order by order number.
Get a printable receipt for a specific order including student info, line items, subtotal, discount, total, and payment method.
List all reviews submitted by the authenticated student, including course details for each review.
Submit a new review or update an existing review for a course. One review per course per student. Requires enrollment. Rating: 1-5, comment: optional (max 1000 chars).
Delete a specific review owned by the authenticated student.
List all wishlisted courses for the authenticated student. Supports pagination.
Add a course to the student's wishlist by course ID.
Remove a course from the student's wishlist by course ID.
Save the current video playback position for a lesson. Requires progress_seconds and duration_seconds.
Get the student's saved video playback position for a lesson.
List all notes the student has created for a specific lesson.
Create a new note for a lesson. Requires content (max 5000). Optional: timestamp_seconds for video position.
Update an existing note. Only the note owner can update it.
Delete a note owned by the authenticated student.
List all notifications for the authenticated student. Supports pagination.
Get the count of unread notifications for the authenticated student.
Mark a single notification as read by notification UUID.
Mark all unread notifications as read for the authenticated student.
Get the student's notification preference settings (email, push, course updates, promotional, quiz reminders, certificate issued).

body.raw:
{
    "email_notifications": true,
    "push_notifications": false,
    "course_updates": true,
    "promotional": false,
    "quiz_reminders": true,
    "certificate_issued": true
}

request.description: Update the student's notification preference settings. All fields are optional booleans.
List all active devices/sessions for the authenticated student, including device name, IP, last active time, and whether it's the current device.
Revoke a specific device session by token ID. Cannot revoke the current device.
Submit a refund request for a completed order. Requires a reason (max 1000 characters). One refund request per order.
Downloads subscription invoice as PDF. Requires student role.

item.name: Instructor
item.description: Instructor-specific endpoints requiring authentication with an instructor role.

request.description: Get instructor dashboard metrics: total revenue, new students this month, average rating, active courses, revenue growth, and recent reviews.
List all courses belonging to the authenticated instructor with category, student count, and average rating. Supports pagination.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Advanced Clinical Pharmacology",
    "category_id": 1,
    "short_description": "Master the principles of clinical pharmacology with real-world case studies and evidence-based approaches.",
    "description": "This comprehensive course covers advanced clinical pharmacology concepts including pharmacokinetics, pharmacodynamics, drug interactions, therapeutic drug monitoring, and evidence-based prescribing. Ideal for pharmacy students, clinical pharmacists, and healthcare professionals seeking to deepen their understanding of drug therapy optimization.",
    "price": 299.99,
    "original_price": 449.99,
    "level": "advanced",
    "language": "English",
    "is_bundle": false,
    "requirements": [
        "Basic knowledge of pharmacology",
        "Understanding of human physiology",
        "Familiarity with medical terminology"
    ],
    "learning_outcomes": [
        "Apply pharmacokinetic principles to clinical scenarios",
        "Identify and manage drug interactions",
        "Perform therapeutic drug monitoring",
        "Design evidence-based treatment plans",
        "Evaluate drug safety and efficacy data"
    ],
    "tags": [
        "pharmacology",
        "clinical pharmacy",
        "drug therapy",
        "healthcare"
    ]
}

request.description: Create a new course. Requires: title, category_id, price. Optional: short_description, description, image, original_price, level, language, is_bundle, requirements, learning_outcomes, tags.
Get detailed information about a specific instructor course by ID, including modules, lessons, category, reviews, and statistics.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Advanced Clinical Pharmacology - Updated",
    "price": 349.99,
    "level": "advanced",
    "short_description": "Updated: Master advanced clinical pharmacology with real-world case studies.",
    "tags": [
        "pharmacology",
        "clinical pharmacy",
        "drug therapy",
        "healthcare",
        "updated"
    ]
}

request.description: Update an existing course. All fields are optional (partial update supported).
Delete a specific course owned by the authenticated instructor.
Create a new module within a course. Requires: title. Optional: sort_order.
Update an existing module. Verifies ownership through the module's course.
Delete a specific module owned by the authenticated instructor.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "New Lesson",
    "type": "video",
    "duration_minutes": 30,
    "video_url": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=example123",
    "content": "In this lesson, we cover the fundamentals of drug-receptor interactions and their clinical significance.",
    "is_free": false,
    "sort_order": 1
}

request.description: Create a new lesson within a module. Requires: title. Optional: type (video|quiz|assignment|reading), duration_minutes, video_url, content, is_free, sort_order.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Updated Lesson Title",
    "type": "video",
    "duration_minutes": 45,
    "video_url": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=updated123",
    "content": "Updated lesson content covering advanced pharmacodynamics.",
    "is_free": true,
    "sort_order": 2
}

request.description: Update an existing lesson. Verifies ownership through the lesson's module and course.
Delete a specific lesson owned by the authenticated instructor.
Get instructor revenue summary: available balance, pending clearance, and lifetime earnings.

query.description: Filter by type: all, sales, payouts
Filter by period: current_month, last_month, year_to_date

request.description: List all transactions for the authenticated instructor with filtering by type (sales/payouts) and time period. Supports pagination.
Submit a payout request. Amount must not exceed the available balance. Requires: amount (min 1), payout_method.
List all quizzes for courses owned by the authenticated instructor. Paginated, ordered by newest first. Includes course, lesson, and question count.
Create a new quiz for a course, optionally with inline questions and options. Each question must have exactly 4 options (A,B,C,D) with exactly 1 correct answer.
Get quiz details with all questions and options. Only accessible to the course owner.
Update quiz settings (title, passing_score, time_limit_minutes, max_attempts, lesson_id). Only the course owner can update.
Delete a quiz and all its questions and options. Only the course owner can delete.
Add a question with 4 options to a quiz. Each question must have exactly 4 options (A,B,C,D) with exactly 1 correct answer.
Update a question and optionally its options. If options are provided, all 4 are replaced. Only the course owner can update.
Delete a question and its options from a quiz. Only the course owner can delete.
Reorder modules within a course. Provide an array of module IDs in the desired order. Only the course owner can reorder.
Reorder lessons within a module. Provide an array of lesson IDs in the desired order. Only the course owner can reorder.
Get detailed analytics for a specific course: enrollments, active students, completion rate, average rating, revenue, progress averages, and time-series data.

formdata.description: Resource file (pdf, doc, docx, ppt, pptx, xls, xlsx, zip). Max 10MB.

request.description: Upload a downloadable resource file for a lesson. Accepts pdf, doc, docx, ppt, pptx, xls, xlsx, zip. Max 10MB.
Update resource metadata (title and description). Only the resource owner can update.
Delete a lesson resource and its file from storage. Only the resource owner can delete.
Add an existing course as an item within a bundle course. The target course must be a bundle (is_bundle = true). Requires course_id, optional sort_order.
Remove a course from a bundle by bundle item ID.
Reorder courses within a bundle. Provide an array of bundle item IDs in the desired order.
Downloads all instructor transactions as a CSV file.
Returns paginated list of enrolled students with progress for a specific course.

item.name: Cart & Checkout
item.description: Shopping cart and checkout endpoints for purchasing courses.

request.description: Get the current user's cart with items, course details, instructor info, and applied promo code.
Add a published course to the cart. Validates the course exists, is published, and the user is not already enrolled or has it in cart.
Remove a specific item from the cart by cart item ID.
Remove all items from the cart and clear any applied promo code.
Apply a promo code to the cart. Validates code is active, not expired, within usage limits, and meets minimum purchase requirement.
Remove the currently applied promo code from the cart.

Process checkout for the current cart. Creates an order, enrolls the user in purchased courses, generates instructor transactions, and clears the cart. Payment methods: credit_card, mobile_wallet, bank_transfer, installment.

item.name: Quizzes
item.description: Quiz endpoints for enrolled students to view and attempt quizzes.

request.description: Get quiz details with questions and answer options (without correct answer indicators). Requires student to be enrolled in the quiz's course.

Submit a quiz attempt with answers. Grades each answer, calculates score, determines pass/fail, and auto-marks the quiz lesson as completed if passed. Returns detailed results with correct answers and explanations.

item.name: Profile
item.description: User profile management endpoints for authenticated users.

request.description: Update user profile fields (name, phone). For instructors, also supports: bio, specialization, qualification, experience_years, website, linkedin, twitter.
Update the authenticated user's password. Requires current password verification. New password must be at least 8 characters and confirmed.

formdata.description: Image file (jpeg, png, jpg, gif, webp). Max 2MB.

request.description: Upload a new avatar image. Accepts jpeg, png, jpg, gif, webp formats. Maximum file size: 2MB. Replaces any existing avatar.
Remove the authenticated user's avatar image from storage and set avatar to null.

item.name: Webhooks
item.description: Payment webhook endpoints for processing external payment gateway callbacks.

request.description: Paymob payment webhook endpoint. Receives payment status updates verified by HMAC signature. On success: updates order to completed, creates enrollments. On failure: marks order as failed.

item.name: Phase 3 - Preferences & Messages
item.description: User preferences, messaging, downloads, shares, installments.

body.raw: {"receiver_id": 2, "course_id": 1, "subject": "Question about Module 3", "body": "Dr., I have a question about the case study..."}

item.name: Phase 4 - Social Login & Account
item.description: Phase 4 endpoints: Social OAuth login, feature flags, account deletion (GDPR), and certificate PDF download/preview.

request.description: Redirects to Google OAuth consent screen. Browser will follow the 302 redirect.
Redirects to Facebook OAuth consent screen. Browser will follow the 302 redirect.
Handles Google OAuth callback. Normally called by the provider redirect, not directly.
Handles Facebook OAuth callback. Normally called by the provider redirect, not directly.
Exchange a Google access token for an API auth token. For SPA/mobile clients.
Exchange a Facebook access token for an API auth token. For SPA/mobile clients.
Returns a boolean map of all feature flags.
Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account with GDPR-compliant data anonymization.
Downloads the certificate as a PDF file attachment.
Renders the certificate PDF inline in the browser for preview.

item.name: Feature Plan - Public
item.description: Feature Plan public endpoints: stats, testimonials, instructors, categories, FAQs, and legal pages.

request.description: Returns cached platform statistics: active students, total courses, total instructors, average rating.
Returns top approved reviews (rating >= 4) with user name, avatar, title and course title.
Returns all active instructors with specialization, courses_count, total_students, average_rating.
Returns category detail with courses_count, total_students, featured_videos_count, and courses list.
Returns paginated free video lessons in a category with search and sorting.
Returns legal page content by slug. Use 'terms' or 'privacy'.
Subscribe to notifications for a category. Requires authentication.
Unsubscribe from category notifications. Requires authentication.
Downloads subscription invoice as PDF. Requires student role.
Downloads all instructor transactions as a CSV file.
Returns paginated list of enrolled students with progress for a specific course.
